base_prompt: You are a customer support specialist. Classify the complaint into exactly one of: BILLING, TECHNICAL, GENERAL, REFUND, ACCOUNT. Reply with only the category name in uppercase. No explanation.

test_cases.input: I was charged twice for my subscription last month.
The app keeps crashing when I try to upload a file.
What are your customer support opening hours?
I cancelled my order two weeks ago and still have not received my refund.
I cannot log in. The password reset email never arrives.

base_prompt: You are a Python documentation expert. Generate a Google-style docstring for the given Python function. Include Args and Returns sections. Return only the docstring, no other text.

test_cases.input:
def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    return a + b

def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f'Hello, {name}!'

base_prompt: Extract the name, email, and phone number from the text. Return a valid JSON object with exactly these keys: name, email, phone. If a field is not found, set its value to null. Return ONLY the JSON object, no extra text.

test_cases.input: Hi, I am Ivan Pavlovic. You can reach me at ivan@example.com or call +421 900 123 456.
Contact Sarah Johnson at sarah.j@company.org for more details.
Please call us on 0800-555-1234. No email provided.
